 03: """Safe vector access with bounds checking via C++ at() and except +.

PyDoc_STRVAR(__pyx_doc_13cnake_charmer_2cy_10algorithms_23cpp_except_bounds_check_cpp_except_bounds_check, "Populate a C++ vector of size n and perform m=2*n lookups, some out of bounds.\n\n    Values: val[i] = (i * 2654435761) % n\n    Lookup indices: idx = (i * 1103515245 + 12345) % (n + n // 100)\n    Uses vector::at() which throws std::out_of_range mapped to IndexError.\n\n    Args:\n        n: Size of the vector and half the number of lookups.\n\n    Returns:\n        Tuple of (sum_of_valid_values % (10**9+7), out_of_bounds_count).\n    ");

 21: def cpp_except_bounds_check(int n):
 22:     """Populate a C++ vector of size n and perform m=2*n lookups, some out of bounds.
 23: 
 24:     Values: val[i] = (i * 2654435761) % n
 25:     Lookup indices: idx = (i * 1103515245 + 12345) % (n + n // 100)
 26:     Uses vector::at() which throws std::out_of_range mapped to IndexError.
 27: 
 28:     Args:
 29:         n: Size of the vector and half the number of lookups.
 30: 
 31:     Returns:
 32:         Tuple of (sum_of_valid_values % (10**9+7), out_of_bounds_count).
 33:     """
 34:     cdef checked_vector data
 35:     cdef int i
 36:     cdef long long li
+37:     cdef int m = 2 * n
  __pyx_v_m = (2 * __pyx_v_n);

+38:     cdef int upper = n + n // 100
  __pyx_v_upper = (__pyx_v_n + (__pyx_v_n / 0x64));

+39:     cdef long long sum_valid = 0
  __pyx_v_sum_valid = 0;

+40:     cdef int oob_count = 0
  __pyx_v_oob_count = 0;

 41:     cdef size_t idx
 42: 
+43:     for i in range(n):
  __pyx_t_1 = __pyx_v_n;
  __pyx_t_2 = __pyx_t_1;
  for (__pyx_t_3 = 0; __pyx_t_3 < __pyx_t_2; __pyx_t_3+=1) {
    __pyx_v_i = __pyx_t_3;

+44:         li = (<long long>i * <long long>2654435761) % n
    __pyx_v_li = ((((PY_LONG_LONG)__pyx_v_i) * ((PY_LONG_LONG)0x9E3779B1)) % __pyx_v_n);

+45:         data.push_back(<int>li)
    __pyx_v_data.push_back(((int)__pyx_v_li));
  }

 46: 
+47:     for i in range(m):
  __pyx_t_1 = __pyx_v_m;
  __pyx_t_2 = __pyx_t_1;
  for (__pyx_t_3 = 0; __pyx_t_3 < __pyx_t_2; __pyx_t_3+=1) {
    __pyx_v_i = __pyx_t_3;

+48:         idx = (<long long>i * <long long>1103515245 + <long long>12345) % upper
    __pyx_v_idx = (((((PY_LONG_LONG)__pyx_v_i) * ((PY_LONG_LONG)0x41C64E6D)) + ((PY_LONG_LONG)0x3039)) % __pyx_v_upper);
